description: Clean, low-noise time-series data with few spatial modes
rationale: Standard DMD is optimal for clean, simple dynamics

description: Noisy experimental sensor data with outliers
rationale: BOP-DMD uses bagging to handle noise robustly

description: Multi-scale phenomena with fast and slow dynamics
rationale: Multi-Resolution DMD separates dynamics at different time scales

description: System with known external forcing/actuation inputs
rationale: DMDc explicitly accounts for control/forcing inputs

description: Very high-dimensional spatial data (e.g., full CFD field)
rationale: Compressed DMD reduces computational cost for high-dimensional data

description: Data from a nonlinear dynamical system requiring lifting
rationale: Extended DMD uses dictionary functions to lift nonlinear dynamics into linear space

description: Time-series with limited snapshots requiring delay embedding
rationale: Hankel DMD uses time-delay embedding to augment limited snapshot data

description: System where physical conservation laws are known a priori
rationale: Physics-informed DMD enforces known physical constraints on the operator

description: Design study where a system parameter varies across experiments
rationale: Parametric DMD interpolates dynamics across parameter values

description: Goal is to identify only the most important modes from a rich spectrum
rationale: Sparse Promoting DMD selects only the dynamically important modes
